title: seseli mutellina
intro: Seseli mutellina, also known as Alpine Carrot or Wild Carrot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Seseli mutellina include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Seseli mutellina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
